heading: Study and reports on guarantee fees
label: 4514a Study and reports on guarantee fees
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Federal Housing Finance Regulatory Reform Act of 2008, and also as part of the Housing and Economic Recovery Act of 2008, and not as part of the Federal Housing Enterprises Financial Safety and Soundness Act of 1992 which comprises this chapter.
DefinitionsFor definitions of terms used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 1002(b) of Pub. L. 110–289section 4511 of this title

children.heading: Ongoing study of fees
children.label: a Ongoing study of fees
children.text: The Director shall conduct an ongoing study of fees charged by enterprises for guaranteeing a mortgage.

children.heading: Collection of data
children.label: b Collection of data
children.text: The Director shall, by regulation or order, establish procedures for the collection of data from enterprises for purposes of this subsection, including the format and the process for collection of such data.1So in original. Probably should be “section”.1

children.heading: Reports to Congress
children.label: c Reports to Congress
children.text: The Director shall annually submit a report to Congress on the results of the study conducted under subsection (a), based on the aggregated data collected under subsection (a) for the subject year, regarding the amount of such fees and the criteria used by the enterprises to determine such fees.
the factors considered in determining the amount of the guarantee fees charged;
the total revenue earned by the enterprises from guarantee fees;
the total costs incurred by the enterprises for providing guarantees;
the average guarantee fee charged by the enterprises;
an analysis of any increase or decrease in guarantee fees from the preceding year;
a breakdown of the revenue and costs associated with providing guarantees, based on product type and risk classifications; and
a breakdown of guarantee fees charged based on asset size of the originator and the number of loans sold or transferred to an enterprise.

children.heading: Protection of information
children.label: e Protection of information
children.text: Nothing in this section may be construed to require or authorize the Director to publicly disclose information that is confidential or proprietary.
